info.title: Voucherify Loyalty v2 API
info.description: Complete API documentation for Voucherify Loyalty v2 system. Requires LOYALTY_V2 feature flag.

tags.name: Card Definitions
tags.description: CRUD operations, lifecycle management, and activity history for card definitions. Card definitions describe the configuration for loyalty cards, including code generation, points expiration, earning/spending limits, pending points, refunds, and balance settings.

tags.name: Programs
tags.description: Loyalty program CRUD, lifecycle management, program-scoped resource assignments (card definitions, earning rules, rewards, tier structures), member management (create, list, get, activate, deactivate, delete), card operations (points adjustment, pending points, expiring points, transactions), reward purchases, and activity history.

tags.name: Earning Rules
tags.description: Manage earning rules that define how customers earn points or receive incentives based on triggers (events, segments, custom events). Includes CRUD, lifecycle, and activity history.

tags.name: Tier Structures
tags.description: CRUD operations, lifecycle management, and activity history for tier structures. Includes nested tier definitions (create, list, update, delete) within tier structures. Tier structures define the tiering model for loyalty programs — how members qualify for and move between tiers.

tags.name: Incentives
tags.description: Manage incentive definitions (fixed points, proportional points, material, digital). Includes CRUD, lifecycle transitions, and activity history.

tags.name: Rewards
tags.description: CRUD, lifecycle operations, and activity history for reward definitions. Rewards can be material (product/SKU) or digital (discount coupons, gift vouchers).

tags.name: Examine
tags.description: Examines the earning of loyalty points for a loyalty program member.

get.description: Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of card definitions with optional filtering and ordering.

parameters.name: filters[junction]
parameters.description: Logical junction for combining filter conditions.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter by exact card definition ID.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$is_not]
parameters.description: Exclude card definitions with this ID.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by multiple card definition IDs.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$not_in]
parameters.description: Exclude card definitions with these IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$before]
parameters.description: Filter for records created before this date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$after]
parameters.description: Filter for records created after this date.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at][conditions][$before]
parameters.description: Filter for records updated before this date.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at][conditions][$after]
parameters.description: Filter for records updated after this date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100).

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Default: `-created_at`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Obtained from a previous list response.

post.description:
Creates a new card definition with the specified configuration.

Required fields: `name`, `type`. All other fields have sensible defaults.
The `code_config` is optional on input but required internally (defaults are generated).

**Custom validators applied:**
- `createCardDefinitionBalanceSettings`: `balance_settings.allow_negative` can only be `true` when `points_expiration.type` is `NO_EXPIRATION`.
- `createCardDefinitionRefunds`: `refunds.earned_points.methods` with type `REVOKE_BELOW_ZERO` requires `balance_settings.allow_negative: true`. Method type `REVOKE_FROM_PENDING` requires `pending_points.type` to be one of `PERIOD_BASED`, `FIXED_DATES`, or `EVENT_BASED`.

get.description: Retrieves a single card definition by its ID.

put.description:
Updates an existing card definition. At least one property must be provided.

When the card definition is **not** in `DRAFT` status, only `name` and `metadata` properties can be updated.
In `DRAFT` status, all available properties can be updated.

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a card definition. The card definition cannot be deleted if it is assigned to a program,
connected to earning rules, incentives, or tier structures.

post.description:
Transitions the card definition to `ACTIVE` status.

Allowed transitions: `DRAFT` -> `ACTIVE`, `INACTIVE` -> `ACTIVE`.

Transitions the card definition to `INACTIVE` status.

Allowed transitions: `ACTIVE` -> `INACTIVE`.

Transitions the card definition back to `DRAFT` status.

Allowed transitions: `ACTIVE` -> `DRAFT`.

Cannot draft a card definition that is connected to a non-draft program, reward,
earning rule, incentive, or tier structure.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of activities (audit log) for a specific card definition.

post.description:
Creates a new loyalty program. Optionally attaches card definitions,
earning rules, rewards, and tier structures in the same request.
The response uses `toCreateDTO(params)` which includes the attached
resource ids alongside the program fields.

get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of loyalty programs. Supports filtering
by id, name, status, and created_at with various conditions.
Retrieves a single loyalty program by id.

put.description:
Updates program properties. When the program is not in DRAFT status,
only `name` and `metadata` can be updated.

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a loyalty program and all its assignments
(card definitions, earning rules, rewards, tier structures).

post.description:
Transitions a program to ACTIVE status. Valid transitions:
DRAFT -> ACTIVE (requires all assignments are ACTIVE),
INACTIVE -> ACTIVE (requires no DRAFT assignments exist).

Transitions a program to INACTIVE status.
Only ACTIVE programs can be deactivated.

get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of activities for a specific program.
Supports filtering by activity id, type, and created_at.

get.summary: List card definition assignments for a program
get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of card definition assignments
for the specified program.

200.description: Paginated list of card definition assignments

post.description:
Assigns and/or unassigns card definitions to/from a program in a single batch.
Program must be in DRAFT status.

get.summary: List earning rule assignments for a program
get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of earning rule assignments
for the specified program.

200.description: Paginated list of earning rule assignments

post.description: Assigns and/or unassigns earning rules to/from a program in a single batch.

get.summary: List tier structure assignments for a program
get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of tier structure assignments
for the specified program.

200.description: Paginated list of tier structure assignments

post.description:
Assigns and/or unassigns tier structures to/from a program in a single batch.
Unassign operations require the program to be in DRAFT status.

get.summary: List reward assignments for a program
get.description:
Returns a cursor-paginated list of reward assignments
for the specified program.

post.description: Assigns and/or unassigns rewards to/from a program in a single batch.

Creates a new member in the specified program. The customer must exist and the program must be in ACTIVE status.
Cards are automatically created for the member based on the program's card definition assignments.
Returns the member with their assigned cards.

**Note:** Card code generation is asynchronous. Cards will appear in the response, but the `code` field may be `null` immediately after creation. The code is generated asynchronously and becomes available shortly after.

409.description: Member already exists for this customer and program

423.description: Program is not in ACTIVE status

get.description:
Lists members of a program with optional filtering and cursor-based pagination.
Supports filtering by id, status, customer_id, and created_at.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor token for pagination (from previous response)

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by member ID in list

parameters.name: filters[customer_id][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by customer ID in list

get.description:
Retrieves a single member by ID within a program, including their assigned cards with balances.

**Note:** Card code generation is asynchronous. The card `code` field may be `null` if code generation has not completed yet (e.g. shortly after member creation).

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a member and all their associated cards within the program.
The program must exist. Returns the deleted member's data.

post.description:
Activates an inactive member. The program must exist and the member must be in a state
that allows activation (i.e., INACTIVE). Fails if the member is already ACTIVE or DELETED.

409.description: Invalid state transition (member cannot be activated from current state)

post.description:
Deactivates an active member. The program must exist and the member must be in a state
that allows deactivation (i.e., ACTIVE). Fails if the member is already INACTIVE or DELETED.

409.description: Invalid state transition (member cannot be deactivated from current state)

get.description:
Lists activities for a specific member with optional filtering by id, type, and created_at.
Uses cursor-based pagination.

Activity types include:
- `vl.member.created`
- `vl.member.deleted`
- `vl.member.activated`
- `vl.member.deactivated`
- `vl.member.card.assigned`
- `vl.member.card.unassigned`

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

post.description:
Manually adjusts points on a member's card. Positive values add points (ADMIN_CREDIT),
negative values subtract points (ADMIN_DEBIT). A value of zero results in no change.

Both the program and member must be in ACTIVE status. The card must be assigned to the member
within the program.

Creates a card transaction in PENDING status that is processed asynchronously.

423.description: Program or member is not in ACTIVE status

get.description:
Lists activities for a specific card with optional filtering by id, type, and created_at.
Uses cursor-based pagination.

Activity types include:
- `vl.card.created`
- `vl.card.assigned`
- `vl.card.unassigned`
- `vl.card.code_generation.succeeded`
- `vl.card.code_generation.failed`

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

get.description:
Lists pending points buckets for a specific card. Only returns PENDING buckets
with future activation dates. If the card definition does not have pending points enabled,
returns an empty list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

post.description:
Manually activates a pending points bucket, converting pending points to active points.
The bucket must be in PENDING status and have a future activation date.
Both the program and member must be ACTIVE. The card definition must have pending points enabled.

Creates a PENDING_POINTS_ACTIVATED transaction processed asynchronously.

423.description:
One of:
- Program or member is not in ACTIVE status
- Pending points not enabled on card definition
- Bucket is not in PENDING status
- Bucket activation date is not in the future

post.description:
Manually cancels a pending points bucket, preventing the points from ever being activated.
The bucket must be in PENDING status and have a future activation date.
Both the program and member must be ACTIVE. The card definition must have pending points enabled.

Creates a PENDING_POINTS_CANCELED transaction processed asynchronously.

423.description:
One of:
- Program or member is not in ACTIVE status
- Pending points not enabled on card definition
- Bucket is not in PENDING status
- Bucket activation date is not in the future

get.description:
Lists active points expiration buckets for a specific card. Only returns ACTIVE buckets
with future expiration dates. If the card definition does not have points expiration enabled,
returns an empty list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

post.description:
Manually expires an active points bucket. The bucket must be in ACTIVE status and
have a future expiration date. Both the program and member must be ACTIVE.
The card definition must have points expiration enabled.

Creates an ADMIN_POINTS_EXPIRATION transaction processed asynchronously.

423.description:
One of:
- Program or member is not in ACTIVE status
- Points expiration not enabled on card definition
- Bucket is not in ACTIVE status
- Bucket expiration date is not in the future

get.description:
Lists transactions for a specific card within a member and program.
Uses cursor-based pagination. Returns all transaction types and statuses.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

post.description:
Initiates a reward purchase for a member. Evaluates the reward cost, checks card balance,
and creates a POINTS_SPENT_ON_REWARD transaction in PENDING status.

The operation is asynchronous - the transaction is processed after the response.
Returns HTTP 202 Accepted.

Requirements:
- Program must be ACTIVE
- Member must be ACTIVE
- Reward must be assigned to the program with available stock
- Member's card must have sufficient balance for the reward cost

423.description:
One of:
- Program or member is not in ACTIVE status
- Reward is out of stock
- No matching reward cost for customer context
- Insufficient card balance

get.description:
Lists reward purchase transactions for a specific member within a program.
Only returns transactions of type PURCHASE. Supports filtering by id and created_at.
Uses cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

post.description: Performs a dry-run estimation of points and incentives a customer (or member) would earn for a given event, without actually triggering any earning rule processing or modifying balances.

Creates a new earning rule. The rule defines a trigger event, validation rules,
and effects (points or incentives) to award when triggered.

Requires `name`, `trigger`, and `earnings` (with at least one effect per earning).
Status defaults to `DRAFT` if not specified.

get.description:
Lists earning rules with optional filtering, ordering, and cursor-based pagination.
Deleted earning rules are excluded.

parameters.name: filters[junction]
parameters.description: Logical junction for combining filter conditions.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter by exact earning rule ID.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by earning rule IDs (up to 100).

parameters.name: filters[name][conditions][$starts_with]
parameters.description: Filter by name starting with prefix.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Default is `-created_at`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (obtained from previous response).

get.description: Retrieves a single earning rule by its unique ID.

put.description:
Updates an existing earning rule. All provided fields replace the existing values.
Fields not provided retain their current values (merge semantics).

When the earning rule is in `DRAFT` status, all properties can be updated.
For `ACTIVE` or `INACTIVE` status, only these properties are allowed:
`name`, `earnings`, `error`, `validity_hours`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `trigger_limits`, `metadata`.

delete.description:
Deletes an earning rule. Cannot delete an earning rule that is assigned to a program.
Returns a `409 Conflict` if the rule is connected to a program.

post.description:
Transitions the earning rule to `ACTIVE` status.

**Allowed transitions:** `DRAFT` → `ACTIVE`, `INACTIVE` → `ACTIVE`.

Validates that all referenced card definitions and incentives exist and are active.

Transitions the earning rule to `INACTIVE` status.

**Allowed transitions:** `ACTIVE` → `INACTIVE`.

Transitions the earning rule back to `DRAFT` status.

**Allowed transitions:** `ACTIVE` → `DRAFT`.

Cannot draft an earning rule that is assigned to a non-draft program (returns `409 Conflict`).

get.description:
Lists activity log entries for a specific earning rule with optional filtering,
ordering, and cursor-based pagination.

post.description:
Creates a new tier structure. The `card_definition_id` must reference an existing card definition.

When `type` is `POINT_EARNED`, the `point_earned` object is required.
When `type` is `POINT_BALANCE`, the `point_earned` field must be null or omitted.

Defaults: `expiration` defaults to `NO_EXPIRATION`, `downgrade` defaults to `NO_DOWNGRADE`,
`status` defaults to `DRAFT`.

get.description: Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of tier structures with optional filtering and ordering.

parameters.name: filters[junction]
parameters.description: Logical junction for combining filter conditions.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter by exact tier structure ID.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$is_not]
parameters.description: Exclude tier structures with this ID.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by multiple tier structure IDs.

parameters.name: filters[id][conditions][$not_in]
parameters.description: Exclude tier structures with these IDs.

parameters.name: filters[name][conditions][$not_contain]
parameters.description: Filter by name not containing substring.

parameters.name: filters[name][conditions][$not_in]
parameters.description: Exclude tier structures with these names.

parameters.name: filters[name][conditions][$has_value]
parameters.description: Filter for records where name has a value.

parameters.name: filters[name][conditions][$is_unknown]
parameters.description: Filter for records where name is unknown.

parameters.name: filters[type][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter by exact tier structure type.

parameters.name: filters[type][conditions][$in]
parameters.description: Filter by multiple tier structure types.

parameters.name: filters[type][conditions][$not_in]
parameters.description: Exclude by multiple tier structure types.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$before]
parameters.description: Filter for records created before this date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$after]
parameters.description: Filter for records created after this date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter for records created exactly N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$more_than]
parameters.description: Filter for records created more than N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$less_than]
parameters.description: Filter for records created less than N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$has_value]
parameters.description: Filter for records where created_at has a value.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$is_unknown]
parameters.description: Filter for records where created_at is unknown.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100).

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Default: `-created_at`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Obtained from a previous list response.

get.description: Returns a single tier structure by ID.

put.description:
Updates an existing tier structure. All fields are optional; omitted fields retain their current values.

When the tier structure is not in `DRAFT` status, only `name` and `metadata` may be updated.

If `type` changes to `POINT_EARNED`, `point_earned` is required.
If `type` changes to `POINT_BALANCE`, `point_earned` must be null.

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a tier structure and all its tiers.
Cannot delete a tier structure that is assigned to a program.

409.description: Tier structure is in use by a program and cannot be deleted.

post.description:
Transitions a tier structure to `ACTIVE` status.
Allowed from: `DRAFT`, `INACTIVE`.
Cannot activate if the program already has an active/draft tier structure assignment at its limit.

409.description: Invalid state transition or assignment limit exceeded.

post.description:
Transitions a tier structure to `INACTIVE` status.
Allowed from: `ACTIVE`.

Transitions a tier structure back to `DRAFT` status.
Allowed from: `ACTIVE`.
Cannot draft a tier structure connected to a non-draft program.

409.description: Invalid state transition or tier structure is connected to a non-draft program.

get.description:
Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of activities (audit log) for a tier structure.
Includes events for the tier structure itself and its nested tiers.

parameters.name: filters[junction]
parameters.description: Logical junction for combining filter conditions.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$before]
parameters.description: Filter for activities created before this date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$after]
parameters.description: Filter for activities created after this date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$is]
parameters.description: Filter for activities created exactly N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$more_than]
parameters.description: Filter for activities created more than N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$less_than]
parameters.description: Filter for activities created less than N days ago.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$has_value]
parameters.description: Filter for records where created_at has a value.

parameters.name: filters[created_at][conditions][$is_unknown]
parameters.description: Filter for records where created_at is unknown.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100).

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Default: `-created_at`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Obtained from a previous list response.

post.description:
Creates a new tier within the specified tier structure.

Maximum of 10 tiers per tier structure.

When `qualification_rules.type` is `POINTS`, `min_value` is required and point ranges
must not overlap with existing tiers.
When `qualification_rules.type` is `SEGMENT`, `segment.id` is required and must
reference a valid segment.

`downgrade.type` defaults to `INHERIT` if omitted.

403.description: Tier overlaps with an existing tier's point range.

409.description: Maximum number of tiers per tier structure exceeded.

get.description: Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of tiers belonging to the specified tier structure.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100).

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Default: `-created_at`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Obtained from a previous list response.

put.description:
Updates an existing tier. All fields are optional; omitted fields retain their current values.

The tier must belong to the specified tier structure.

When changing `qualification_rules.type` to `POINTS`, `min_value` is required and
the new point range must not overlap with other tiers.
When changing to `SEGMENT`, `segment.id` is required.

403.description: Tier overlaps with an existing tier's point range.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a tier. The tier must belong to the specified tier structure.

get.description: Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of incentives. Supports filtering by id, name, status, type, and created_at. Results can be ordered by created_at, name, or type.

post.description: Creates a new incentive. The `type` field determines which detail object (`points`, `points_proportional`, `material`, or `digital`) is required. Exactly one detail object must be provided matching the type.

get.description: Returns a single incentive by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing incentive. In DRAFT status all properties can be updated. In ACTIVE status only `name` and `stock` can be changed. At least one property must be provided.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an incentive. Fails if the incentive is currently referenced by any earning rule.

post.description: Transitions an incentive from DRAFT to ACTIVE. The only valid transition is DRAFT -> ACTIVE. Connected card definitions must exist and be ACTIVE.
Transitions an incentive from ACTIVE to DRAFT. The only valid transition is ACTIVE -> DRAFT. Fails if the incentive is assigned to any active earning rule.

get.description: Returns a paginated, cursor-based list of activity entries for a specific incentive. Supports filtering by activity id, type, and created_at.

200.description: A paginated list of incentive activities.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated, filterable list of rewards.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Supports multiple values.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description:
Filter criteria. Passed via bracket notation in query string, e.g.
`filters[junction]=AND&filters[id][conditions][$is]=rw_xxx`.

post.description:
Creates a new reward. `name` and `type` are required.
Depending on `type`, either `material` or `digital` must be provided (not both).
Referenced campaigns (for digital rewards) or products/SKUs (for material rewards)
must exist.

404.description: Referenced resource not found (campaign, product, or SKU).

get.description: Retrieves a single reward by ID.

put.description:
Updates an existing reward. All properties are optional.
In DRAFT status all properties can be updated.
In ACTIVE or INACTIVE status only `name` and `metadata` are allowed.
When changing `type`, the matching sub-configuration must be supplied
and the previous one is reset to null.

400.description: Invalid payload or restricted property update in non-draft status.

404.description: Reward or referenced resource not found.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a reward. Fails if the reward is currently assigned to any program.

400.description: Reward is in use by one or more programs.

post.description: Transitions a reward to ACTIVE status. Valid from DRAFT or INACTIVE.
Transitions a reward to INACTIVE status. Valid only from ACTIVE.

Transitions a reward back to DRAFT status. Valid only from ACTIVE.
Fails with 423 if the reward is assigned to a non-draft program.

423.description: Reward is locked — assigned to a non-draft program.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated audit log of activities for a specific reward.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter criteria. Passed via bracket notation in query string.

QueryLimit.name: limit
QueryLimit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100, default 10)

ProgramsFilterId.name: filters[id][conditions]
ProgramsFilterId.description: Filter by program id. Supports conditions `$is`, `$is_not`, `$in`, `$not_in`.

ProgramsFilterName.name: filters[name][conditions]
ProgramsFilterName.description: Filter by program name. Supports conditions `$is`, `$is_not`, `$contains`, `$not_contain`, `$starts_with`, `$ends_with`, `$in`, `$not_in`, `$has_value`, `$is_unknown`.

ProgramsFilterStatus.name: filters[status][conditions]
ProgramsFilterStatus.description: Filter by program status. Supports conditions `$is`, `$is_not`, `$in`, `$not_in`. Values are `ACTIVE`, `INACTIVE`, `DRAFT`.

ProgramsFilterCreatedAt.name: filters[created_at][conditions]
ProgramsFilterCreatedAt.description: Filter by creation date. Supports conditions `$before`, `$after`, `$is`, `$more_than`, `$less_than`, `$has_value`, `$is_unknown`.

ProgramActivitiesFilterId.name: filters[id][conditions]
ProgramActivitiesFilterId.description: Filter by activity id. Supports conditions `$is`, `$is_not`, `$in`, `$not_in`.

ProgramActivitiesFilterType.name: filters[type][conditions]
ProgramActivitiesFilterType.description:
Filter by activity type. Supports conditions `$is`, `$is_not`, `$in`, `$not_in`.
Valid values: `vl.program.created`, `vl.program.updated`, `vl.program.deleted`,
`vl.program.activated`, `vl.program.deactivated`,
`vl.program.card_definition.assigned`, `vl.program.card_definition.unassigned`,
`vl.program.earning_rule.assigned`, `vl.program.earning_rule.unassigned`,
`vl.program.reward.assigned`, `vl.program.reward.unassigned`,
`vl.program.tier_structure.assigned`, `vl.program.tier_structure.unassigned`

ProgramActivitiesFilterJunction.name: filters[junction]
ProgramActivitiesFilterJunction.description: Logical junction for combining activity filters

CardDefinitionAssignmentsOrder.name: order
CardDefinitionAssignmentsOrder.description: Sort order for card definition assignments

EarningRuleAssignmentsOrder.name: order
EarningRuleAssignmentsOrder.description: Sort order for earning rule assignments

TierStructureAssignmentsOrder.name: order
TierStructureAssignmentsOrder.description: Sort order for tier structure assignments

BucketId.name: bucketId
BucketId.description: Unique bucket identifier (pending points or expiring points)

IncentiveListLimit.name: limit
IncentiveListLimit.description: Number of results per page (1–100, default 10).

IncentiveListOrder.name: order
IncentiveListOrder.description: Sort order. Prefix with `-` for descending. Accepted fields: `created_at`, `name`, `type`.

IncentiveListCursor.name: cursor
IncentiveListCursor.description: Cursor token for the next page (prefix: `lcrsinc_`).

IncentiveActivitiesLimit.name: limit
IncentiveActivitiesLimit.description: Number of results per page (1–100, default 10).

IncentiveActivitiesCursor.name: cursor
IncentiveActivitiesCursor.description: Cursor token for the next page of activities (prefix: `lcrsainc_`).

RewardQueryLimit.name: limit
RewardQueryLimit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1–100, default 10).

RewardQueryCursor.name: cursor
RewardQueryCursor.description: Pagination cursor returned from a previous response.

ResourceLocked.description: Resource is locked (in use by another resource)

Conflict.description: Resource locked or invalid state transition

example.details: Cannot modify card definition assignment when program status is not DRAFT

ResourceInUse.description: Resource is in use and cannot be deleted.

InvalidStateTransition.description: The requested state transition is not valid from the current state.

example.details: Cannot activate incentive from current state: 'ACTIVE'

PaginationCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page of results.

next.description: Cursor token to pass as the `cursor` query parameter for the next page.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this cursor expires.

CardDefinitionResponse.description: Full card definition DTO returned by all CRUD endpoints.

pattern.description: Code pattern using `#` as placeholder for random characters. Default: 10 `#` characters.

length.description: Number of random characters in the pattern.

charset.description: Characters used for code generation. Default: alphanumeric (0-9a-zA-Z).

value.description: Required and between 1-12 when type is `END_OF_PARTICULAR_MONTH`. Must be null otherwise.

custom_activity_types.description: Custom event type IDs that reset the sliding window.

event_types.description: Custom event type IDs that trigger point activation.

max.description: Maximum balance. Present when type is `BALANCE_BASED`.
Maximum points per transaction. Present when type is `POINTS`.

min_amount.description: Minimum spending amount required to earn points. Present when type is `SPENDING`.

max.description: Maximum spending points. Present when type is `SPENDING_BASED`.

RefundsEarnedPointsMethodDTO.description: Discriminated by `type`. `REVOKE_FROM_PENDING` has no extra fields. `REVOKE_FROM_BALANCE` includes `mode`.

allow_negative.description: Whether the card balance can go below zero. Can only be `true` when `points_expiration.type` is `NO_EXPIRATION`.

data.description: Activity-specific data payload. Always includes `card_definition`. For `assigned`/`unassigned` types, also includes `program` and `program_card_definition`.

channel.description: Channel through which the activity was triggered.

status.description: Initial status. Defaults to `DRAFT` if not provided.

code_config.description: Code generation configuration. Defaults to 10-character alphanumeric pattern if not provided.

earning_limits.description: Earning limits configuration. Defaults to no limits.

spending_limits.description: Spending limits configuration. Defaults to no limits.

refunds.description: Refund policies. Defaults to no refunds.

CardDefinitionUpdateRequest.description: All properties are optional. At least one must be provided. When status is not `DRAFT`, only `name` and `metadata` can be updated.

CodeConfigRequest.description: Code generation configuration. If not provided on create, defaults to a 10-character alphanumeric pattern.

length.description: Number of random characters. Mutually derived with `pattern`.

pattern.description: Code pattern with `#` placeholders for random characters.

rolling_expiration.description: Required when type is `ROLLING_EXPIRATION`. Must be null otherwise.

calendar_expiration.description: Required when type is `CALENDAR_EXPIRATION`. Must be null otherwise.

sliding_expiration.description: Required when type is `SLIDING_EXPIRATION`. Must be null otherwise.

RollingExpirationPeriodRequest.description: Max values vary by unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

value.description: Required (1-12) when type is `END_OF_PARTICULAR_MONTH`. Must be null for other types.

SlidingExpirationRequest.description: At least one of `earning_activity`, `spending_activity`, or `custom_activity` must be `true`. When `custom_activity` is `true`, `custom_activity_types` is required with 1-10 unique items.

SlidingExpirationPeriodRequest.description: Max values vary by unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=1.

period_based.description: Required when type is `PERIOD_BASED`. Must be null otherwise.

fixed_dates.description: Required when type is `FIXED_DATES`. Must be null otherwise.

event_based.description: Required when type is `EVENT_BASED`. Must be null otherwise.

PendingPointsPeriodRequest.description: Max values vary by unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=1.

EventBasedCancelPeriodRequest.description: Max values vary by unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=1.

EarningLimitsGlobalRequest.description: When `NO_LIMIT`, limits must be empty or null. When `LIMITED`, exactly 1 limit is required.

EarningLimitsGlobalLimitRequest.description: Discriminated union on `type`. `BALANCE_BASED` requires `max`. `TIME_BASED` requires `period` and `points`.

EarningLimitsTransactionsRequest.description: When `NO_LIMIT`, limits must be empty or null. When `LIMITED`, at least 1 limit is required with unique types.

VLExamineCustomerIdentification.description: Discriminated union identifying who is being evaluated.

type.description: Determines which ID field is evaluated and required.

customer_id.description: Internal customer ID (cust_*). Evaluates all programs.

customer_source_id.description: External customer source ID. Evaluates all programs.

member_id.description: Internal member ID (mloy_*). Scopes to a single program.

VLExamineCustomerOrderPaid.description: Event-specific payload for customer.order.paid containing context for rule evaluation.

metadata.description: Customer metadata overlay (merged onto the resolved customer, not persisted).

member.description: Member metadata overlay. Only allowed when customer_identification.type is member_id.

event.description: The trigger event that was examined.

memberships.description: List of earning opportunities per active membership.

points_estimation.description: Total estimated points for this card (fixed + proportional + incentive points combined).

SpendingLimitsGlobalRequest.description: When `NO_LIMIT`, limits must be empty or null. When `LIMITED`, at least 1 limit is required with unique types.

SpendingLimitsGlobalLimitRequest.description: Discriminated union on `type`. `SPENDING_BASED` requires `max`. `TIME_BASED` requires `period` and `points`.

SpendingLimitsTransactionsRequest.description: When `NO_LIMIT`, limits must be empty or null. When `LIMITED`, exactly 1 limit is required.

RefundsSpentPointsRequest.description: When `NONE`, methods must be empty or null. When `REFUNDABLE`, exactly 1 method of type `RETURN_POINTS` is required.

RefundsEarnedPointsRequest.description:
When `NONE`, methods must be empty or null. When `REFUNDABLE`, exactly 1 method is required.
`REVOKE_FROM_PENDING` requires pending points to be enabled (type not `IMMEDIATE`).
`REVOKE_FROM_BALANCE` with mode `REVOKE_BELOW_ZERO` requires `balance_settings.allow_negative: true`.

RefundsEarnedPointsMethodRequest.description: Discriminated union on `type`. `REVOKE_FROM_PENDING` needs no extra fields. `REVOKE_FROM_BALANCE` requires `mode`.

DayMonthRequest.description: Day/month pair. Day range depends on month (Feb max 29, Apr/Jun/Sep/Nov max 30, others max 31).

status.description: Initial status (defaults to DRAFT if not provided)

card_definitions.description: Card definitions to assign on creation

earning_rules.description: Earning rules to assign on creation

tier_structures.description: Tier structures to assign on creation

start_date.description: Program start date (ISO 8601). Only updatable in DRAFT status.

end_date.description: Program end date (ISO 8601). Only updatable in DRAFT status.

metadata.description: Custom metadata (merged with existing on update)

ProgramCreateResponse.description:
Extended program DTO returned by toCreateDTO(params). Includes the
program fields plus arrays of attached resource references.

costs.description: Cost definitions for this reward assignment

card_definition_id.description: Card definition to deduct points from

logic.description: Logical formula combining rule definitions (e.g. "1 AND 2")

RewardAssignmentCostsRulesRequest.description:
Rule group object. Keys are numeric identifiers (e.g. "1", "2") pointing
to RewardRulesDefinition objects. The `logic` key defines how rules combine.

error.description: Custom error message when rule fails

rules.description: Nested rule group for complex conditions

message.description: Error message shown when rule fails

RewardRulesConditions.description:
Conditions object with operator keys (`$is`, `$is_not`).
Each operator maps to an array of values (strings, objects, integers, or booleans).

rules.description: Rule group (present only when rules are defined and have definitions)

card_definition_id.description: Card definition to deduct points from

costs.description: Cost definitions for this reward assignment

assigned.description: Successfully assigned card definitions (null if no assign operations)

unassigned.description: Successfully unassigned card definitions (null if no unassign operations)

assigned.description: Successfully assigned earning rules (null if no assign operations)

unassigned.description: Successfully unassigned earning rules (null if no unassign operations)

assigned.description: Successfully assigned tier structures (null if no assign operations)

unassigned.description: Successfully unassigned tier structures (null if no unassign operations)

assigned.description: Successfully assigned rewards (null if no assign operations)

unassigned.description: Successfully unassigned rewards (null if no unassign operations)

data.description: Activity payload (varies by type, typically contains the program DTO snapshot)

customer_id.description: ID of an existing customer to enroll as a member

points.description:
Points to adjust. Positive values add points (ADMIN_CREDIT),
negative values subtract points (ADMIN_DEBIT). Zero results in no change.

reward_id.description: ID of the reward to purchase (must be assigned to the program)

MemberCard.description: A card assignment with card details for a member

member_role.description: Role of the member for this card assignment

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the card was assigned

CardSimple.description: Simplified card representation (used in member card listings)

code.description: Card code. May be `null` when code generation is still pending — codes are generated asynchronously after member creation.
Card code. May be `null` when code generation is still pending — codes are generated asynchronously after member creation.

CardLifetimeBucket.description: Lifetime aggregated point counters for a card

CardLifetimeBucketPoints.description: Lifetime point counters broken down by type

total.description: Total accumulated points (earned + added + activated from pending)

activated.description: Pending points that have been activated

canceled.description: Pending points that have been canceled

CardBalance.description:
Current available balance.
points = total - subtracted - expired - spent - refunded + returned - locked + unlocked
pending_points = max(total - activated - canceled, 0)

CardNextExpiration.description: Information about the next upcoming points expiration

date.description: Date when points will expire (ISO 8601 date)

CardNextActivation.description: Information about the next upcoming pending points activation

points.description: Number of pending points activating next

date.description: Date when pending points will activate (not present for EVENT_BASED type)

cancel_date.description: Date when pending points will be auto-canceled (only for EVENT_BASED type)

type.description:
Activity type. Member types: vl.member.created, vl.member.deleted,
vl.member.activated, vl.member.deactivated, vl.member.card.assigned,
vl.member.card.unassigned. Card types: vl.card.created, vl.card.assigned,
vl.card.unassigned, vl.card.code_generation.succeeded, vl.card.code_generation.failed.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the activity occurred

PointsAdjustmentResponse.description: Result of a manual points adjustment operation

status.description:
TRANSACTION_CREATED when points were adjusted.
NO_CHANGE when amount was zero.

examples: Provided amount is zero, transaction was not created

transaction.description: The created transaction (null when status is NO_CHANGE)

PointsActivationResponse.description: Result of a pending points activation operation

PointsCancellationResponse.description: Result of a pending points cancellation operation

PointsExpirationResponse.description: Result of a manual points expiration operation

RewardPurchaseResponse.description: Result of a reward purchase operation

examples: Points spent on reward transaction created

transaction.description: The created card transaction for the reward purchase

CardTransaction.description: A card transaction recording a points operation

CardTransactionDetails.description:
Transaction details vary by transaction type.
All types include `reason` (string or null), `metadata` (object), and optionally `rejection`.

rejection.description: Rejection details (only present for REJECTED transactions)

points.description: Points details (present for most transaction types)

CardTransactionRejection.description: Details about why a transaction was rejected

PendingPointsBucket.description: A bucket of pending points awaiting activation

total.description: Total pending points in this bucket

type.description: Pending points type (e.g., PERIOD_BASED, FIXED_DATES, EVENT_BASED)

ExpiringPointsBucket.description: A bucket of points with a scheduled expiration date

total.description: Total points in this expiration bucket

expiration_date.description: Date when points will expire (ISO 8601 date)

expiration_type.description: Type of expiration (e.g., ROLLING, CALENDAR, SLIDING)

RewardTransaction.description: A reward transaction recording a reward purchase

type.description: Transaction type (always PURCHASE for this endpoint)

name.description: Human-readable name for the earning rule.

earnings.description: Array of earning definitions, each with optional rules and required effects.

error.description: Custom error message shown when earning rule conditions are not met.

validity_hours.description: Time-of-day restrictions for when the rule is active.

trigger_limits.description: Cooldown and frequency limits for how often the rule can trigger per customer.

EarningRuleUpdateRequest.description:
All fields are optional. Provided fields replace existing values; omitted fields retain current values.
When status is not `DRAFT`, only `name`, `earnings`, `error`, `validity_hours`, `start_date`,
`end_date`, `trigger_limits`, and `metadata` may be updated.

event.description:
The event that triggers this earning rule.
- `customer.order.paid`: Triggered when a customer's order is paid.
- `customer.custom_event`: Triggered by a custom event (requires `custom_event`).
- `customer.segment.entered`: Triggered when a customer enters a segment (requires `segment`).

custom_event.description: Required when `event` is `customer.custom_event`. Must be `null` otherwise.

segment.description: Required when `event` is `customer.segment.entered`. Must be `null` otherwise.

schema_id.description: ID of the custom event schema.

name.description: Optional name for this earning definition.

rules.description: Optional validation rules that must pass before effects are applied.

effects.description: Effects to apply when rules pass (at least one required).

logic.description:
Logical formula combining rule definitions by their numeric keys.
Supports `AND`, `OR`, and parentheses. Example: `"1 AND (2 OR 3)"`.

EarningRuleRulesGroup.description:
A rules group containing a `logic` formula key and numbered rule definitions.
Keys other than `logic` must be positive integers (e.g., `"1"`, `"2"`, `"3"`).
Minimum 2 properties (logic + at least one rule definition).

name.description:
Rule definition name. Available names depend on the trigger event:
- `customer.order.paid`: All names except `custom_event.metadata`.
- `customer.custom_event`: `customer.segment`, `customer.metadata`, `member.loyalty.tier`, `custom_event.metadata`.
- `customer.segment.entered`: `customer.segment`, `customer.metadata`, `member.loyalty.tier`.

schema_id.description: Optional reference to a metadata schema.

EarningRuleConditions.description:
Condition operators applied to the rule definition. Allowed operators depend on the rule name:
- `customer.segment`, `member.loyalty.tier`: `$is`, `$is_not`
- `order.items.every/any/none/cheapest/most_expensive`: `$is`, `$from`
- `order.items.count`, `order.items.aggregated_quantity`, `order.items.quantity`: `$more_than`, `$is`, `$less_than`, `$less_than_or_equal`, `$more_than_or_equal`, `$in`, `$not_in`
- `order.amount`, `order.initial_amount`, `order.total_amount`, `order.items.price_any`, `order.items.price_each`: `$more_than`, `$more_than_or_equal`, `$is`, `$less_than`, `$less_than_or_equal`
- `order.items.aggregated_amount`, `order.items.price`: `$more_than_or_equal`, `$is`, `$less_than_or_equal`

type.description:
The type of effect:
- `POINTS`: Awards a fixed number of points.
- `POINTS_PROPORTIONAL`: Awards points proportional to order/customer values.
- `INCENTIVE`: Awards a predefined incentive.

points.description: Required when `type` is `POINTS`. Must be `null` otherwise.

points_proportional.description: Required when `type` is `POINTS_PROPORTIONAL`. Must be `null` otherwise.

incentive.description: Required when `type` is `INCENTIVE`. Must be `null` otherwise.

value.description: Fixed number of points to award.

card_definition_id.description: ID of the card definition to award points to.

points_expiration.description: Optional effect-level expiration override for the awarded points.

calculation_type.description:
Determines how proportional points are calculated:
- `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT`: Based on `order.amount` (before discounts).
- `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT`: Based on `order.total_amount` (after discounts).
- `ORDER_METADATA_VALUE`: Based on `order.metadata` (numeric metadata property).
- `CUSTOMER_METADATA_VALUE`: Based on `customer.metadata` (numeric metadata property).
- `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT`: Based on `order_items.amount` (item amount before discounts).
- `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT`: Based on `order_items.subtotal_amount` (item amount after discounts).
- `ORDER_ITEMS_QUANTITY`: Based on `order_items.quantity`.

card_definition_id.description: ID of the card definition to award points to.

EarningRuleEffectPointsProportional.description:
Conditional requirements based on `calculation_type`:
- `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT`: `order` required with `amount`. `customer` and `order_items` must be null.
- `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT`: `order` required with `total_amount`. `customer` and `order_items` must be null.
- `ORDER_METADATA_VALUE`: `order` required with `metadata`. `customer` and `order_items` must be null.
- `CUSTOMER_METADATA_VALUE`: `customer` required with `metadata`. `order` and `order_items` must be null.
- `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT`: `order_items` required with `amount`. `order` and `customer` must be null.
- `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT`: `order_items` required with `subtotal_amount`. `order` and `customer` must be null.
- `ORDER_ITEMS_QUANTITY`: `order_items` required with `quantity`. `order` and `customer` must be null.

id.description: ID of the incentive to award.

EarningRulePointsProportionalOrder.description: Order-based proportional calculation. Provide the sub-property matching the `calculation_type`.

EarningRulePointsProportionalOrderItems.description: Order items-based proportional calculation. Provide the sub-property matching the `calculation_type`.

property.description: The metadata property name to read the numeric value from.

applicable_to.description: Product, SKU, or collection criteria for filtering matching order items.

type.description:
Type of applicable-to target:
- `product`: Requires `product` sub-object with `id`.
- `sku`: Requires `sku` sub-object with `id`.
- `products_collection`: Requires `products_collection` sub-object with `id`.

EarningRulePointsProportionalApplicableT.description: Only the sub-object matching `type` should be provided; others must be null.

type.description:
Points expiration strategy:
- `NO_EXPIRATION`: Points never expire. Other expiration sub-objects must be null.
- `ROLLING_EXPIRATION`: Points expire after a rolling period. Requires `rolling_expiration`.
- `CALENDAR_EXPIRATION`: Points expire on fixed calendar dates. Requires `calendar_expiration`.
- `SLIDING_EXPIRATION`: Expiration resets on customer activity. Requires `sliding_expiration`.

rounding.description: Optional rounding to snap expiration to period boundaries.

type.description:
Rounding strategy. When `END_OF_PARTICULAR_MONTH`, `value` is required (1–12 for month number).
For all other types, `value` must be null.

day.description:
Day of month. Maximum depends on month:
- Months 1,3,5,7,8,10,12: max 31
- Months 4,6,9,11: max 30
- Month 2: max 29

custom_activity.description: Reset expiration on custom activity types.

oneOf.description: Required when `custom_activity` is `true`. Max 10 unique items.

SlidingExpiration.description:
At least one of `earning_activity`, `spending_activity`, or `custom_activity` must be `true`.
When `custom_activity` is `true`, `custom_activity_types` is required with 1–10 unique string items.

daily.description: Array of daily time windows. Overlapping windows for the same day are not allowed.

start_time.description: Start time in `HH:mm` format. Must be before `end_time`.

type.description:
- `NO_COOLDOWN`: No cooldown period between triggers.
- `FIXED_COOLDOWN`: Requires `fixed_cooldown` with period configuration.

fixed_cooldown.description: Required when `type` is `FIXED_COOLDOWN`. Must be null for `NO_COOLDOWN`.

value.description:
Cooldown duration. Maximum depends on unit:
- `HOUR`: 1–24
- `DAY`: 1–90
- `WEEK`: 1–52
- `MONTH`: 1–12
- `YEAR`: 1

type.description:
- `NO_LIMIT`: No frequency restrictions.
- `LIMITED`: Requires `limits` array with exactly one limit configuration.

limits.description:
When `type` is `LIMITED`, must be an array with exactly 1 item.
When `type` is `NO_LIMIT`, must be empty array or null.

unit.description: The time period unit for frequency limiting.

max.description: Maximum number of triggers allowed within the frequency period.

message.description: Custom error message when rule conditions are not satisfied.

data.description: Activity-specific data containing the earning rule snapshot.

TierStructure.description: A tier structure resource as returned by the API.

card_definition_id.description: ID of the linked card definition.

point_earned.description: Point-earned tracking configuration. Present when `type` is `POINT_EARNED`.

type.description: When the earned points are applied to tier qualification.

TierStructureExpiration.description:
Expiration configuration. The sub-object that is present depends on `type`:
- `NO_EXPIRATION`: no sub-objects
- `ROLLING_EXPIRATION`: `rolling_expiration` required
- `CALENDAR_EXPIRATION`: `calendar_expiration` required
- `SLIDING_EXPIRATION`: `sliding_expiration` required

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

calendar_dates.description: List of calendar dates when tier qualification expires.

TierStructureCalendarDate.description: Day/month pair. Day range depends on month (Feb max 29, Apr/Jun/Sep/Nov max 30, others max 31).

TierStructureSlidingExpiration.description: Sliding window expiration that resets on qualifying activity.

earning_activity.description: Whether earning activity resets the expiration window.

spending_activity.description: Whether spending activity resets the expiration window.

custom_activity.description: Whether custom activity resets the expiration window.

custom_activity_types.description: Custom event schema IDs that reset the window. Required when `custom_activity` is true.

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

grace_period.description: Optional grace period before downgrade takes effect.

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

round_up.description: Whether to round up the grace period to the next full unit.

card_definition_id.description: ID of an existing card definition to link.

point_earned.description: Required when `type` is `POINT_EARNED`. Must be null when `type` is `POINT_BALANCE`.

TierStructureUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional. When not in `DRAFT` status, only `name` and `metadata` may be updated.

card_definition_id.description: ID of an existing card definition to link.

point_earned.description: Required when `type` changes to `POINT_EARNED`. Must be null when `type` is `POINT_BALANCE`.

type.description: When the earned points are applied to tier qualification.

TierStructureExpirationRequest.description:
Expiration configuration. Supply the matching sub-object for the chosen `type`:
- `NO_EXPIRATION`: no sub-objects allowed
- `ROLLING_EXPIRATION`: `rolling_expiration` required
- `CALENDAR_EXPIRATION`: `calendar_expiration` required
- `SLIDING_EXPIRATION`: `sliding_expiration` required

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

calendar_dates.description: List of calendar dates when tier qualification expires.

TierStructureCalendarDateRequest.description: Day/month pair. Day range depends on month (Feb max 29, Apr/Jun/Sep/Nov max 30, others max 31).

TierStructureSlidingExpirationRequest.description: Sliding window expiration. At least one activity type must be true.

earning_activity.description: Whether earning activity resets the expiration window.

spending_activity.description: Whether spending activity resets the expiration window.

custom_activity.description: Whether custom activity resets the expiration window.

custom_activity_types.description: Custom event schema IDs. Required and non-empty when `custom_activity` is true. Items must be unique.

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

grace_period.description: Optional grace period before downgrade takes effect.

value.description: Duration value. Max depends on unit: DAY=90, MONTH=12, YEAR=5.

round_up.description: Whether to round up the grace period to the next full unit.

Tier.description: A tier resource as returned by the API.

tier_structure_id.description: ID of the parent tier structure.

qualification_rules.description: Rules determining how members qualify for this tier.

TierQualificationRules.description:
When `type` is `POINTS`, `min_value` is required and defines the point threshold.
`max_value` is optional (open-ended tier if omitted).
When `type` is `SEGMENT`, `segment` is required.

min_value.description: Minimum point value for tier qualification.

max_value.description: Maximum point value for tier qualification.

type.description: `INHERIT` uses the tier structure's downgrade setting. `NO_DOWNGRADE` disables downgrade for this tier.

TierUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional. Omitted fields retain their current values.

TierQualificationRulesRequest.description:
When `type` is `POINTS`, `min_value` is required. `max_value` is optional but if
provided must be >= `min_value`. Cannot have `max_value` without `min_value`.
When `type` is `SEGMENT`, `segment` is required and `min_value`/`max_value` are not allowed.

min_value.description: Minimum point value for tier qualification.

max_value.description: Maximum point value. Must be >= min_value.

type.description: `INHERIT` uses the tier structure's downgrade setting.

tier_structure_id.description: ID of the tier structure this activity belongs to.

data.description: Event-specific payload containing the affected resource snapshots.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the activity occurred.

source.description: Source channel that triggered the activity.

IncentiveType.description: Type of incentive. Determines which detail object is present in the response and required in create/update requests.

IncentiveStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the incentive.

IncentiveCreateStatus.description: Status allowed when creating an incentive.

PointsProportionalCalculationType.description: Calculation type for proportional points. Determines which sub-object (`order`, `customer`, `order_items`) is required.

card_definition_id.description: Card definition to which points are added.

every.description: For every `every` units of the base metric.

property.description: Metadata property key to read the value from.

IncentivePointsProportionalApplicableTo.description: Identifies a product, SKU, or products collection that the calculation applies to. Exactly one of `product`, `sku`, or `products_collection` must be provided based on `type`.

IncentivePointsProportionalDTO.description: Proportional-points incentive configuration. The `calculation_type` determines which sub-object is required: - `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT` -> `order.amount` - `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_AMOUNT` -> `order.total_amount` - `ORDER_METADATA_VALUE` -> `order.metadata` - `CUSTOMER_METADATA_VALUE` -> `customer.metadata` - `PRE_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT` -> `order_items.amount` - `POST_DISCOUNT_ORDER_ITEMS_AMOUNT` -> `order_items.subtotal_amount` - `ORDER_ITEMS_QUANTITY` -> `order_items.quantity`

card_definition_id.description: Card definition to which points are added.

IncentiveMaterialDTO.description: Material incentive configuration. Exactly one of `product` or `sku` must be provided based on `type`.

balance.description: Initial balance to set on the gift voucher.

IncentiveDigitalDTO.description: Digital incentive configuration. Exactly one of `discount_coupons` or `gift_vouchers` must be provided based on `type`.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 last-update timestamp, or null if never updated.

IncentiveCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating an incentive. The `type` field determines which detail object is required. Exactly one of `points`, `points_proportional`, `material`, or `digital` must be non-null, matching the given `type`.

name.description: Human-readable name (must be unique per project).

IncentiveUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating an incentive. At least one property must be provided. When the incentive is ACTIVE, only `name` and `stock` are allowed. When DRAFT, all properties may be updated. If `type` changes the corresponding detail object must also be provided.

IncentiveActivityDTO.description: An activity log entry for an incentive.

incentive_id.description: The incentive this activity belongs to.

data.description: Activity payload. Contains the incentive DTO snapshot.

group_id.description: Groups related activities from the same transaction.

related_object_ids.description: IDs of the objects that reference this resource.

material.description: Material configuration. Present only when type is MATERIAL.

digital.description: Digital configuration. Present only when type is DIGITAL.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 last-update timestamp. Null if never updated.

product.description: Present when material type is PRODUCT.

sku.description: Present when material type is SKU.

discount_coupons.description: Present when digital type is DISCOUNT_COUPONS.

gift_vouchers.description: Present when digital type is GIFT_VOUCHERS.

type.description: Reward type. Determines which sub-configuration is required.

status.description: Initial status. Defaults to DRAFT when omitted.

material.description: Required when type is MATERIAL. Must be null/absent when type is DIGITAL.

digital.description: Required when type is DIGITAL. Must be null/absent when type is MATERIAL.

VLRewardUpdateAPIParams.description:
Payload for updating a reward. All fields are optional.
In ACTIVE/INACTIVE status only `name` and `metadata` may be updated.
Supplying `type` resets the non-matching sub-configuration to null.

metadata.description: Key-value metadata. Merged with existing metadata on update.

product.description: Required when material type is PRODUCT. Must be null when SKU.

sku.description: Required when material type is SKU. Must be null when PRODUCT.

campaign_id.description: Discount-coupons campaign ID. The campaign must be of type DISCOUNT_COUPONS.
Gift-vouchers campaign ID. The campaign must be of type GIFT_VOUCHERS.

balance.description: Gift voucher balance. Must be a non-negative number.

cursor.description: Null when there are no more pages.
Null when there are no more pages.

data.description:
Activity payload. Always contains `reward`.
For `assigned` / `unassigned` types also includes `program` and `program_reward`.

VLRewardsFilters.description: Filter criteria for the rewards list.

junction.description: Logical junction between field filters. Default AND.

VLRewardActivitiesFilters.description: Filter criteria for the reward activities list.

StringFilterField.description: String-based filter. Supports pattern, containment, and presence conditions.

DateFilterField.description: Date-based filter. Supports absolute dates, relative days-ago, and presence checks.

StringOrSingleArray.description: A single string or a one-element string array.

StringOrBatchArray.description: A single string or a string array (max 10 items).

StringOrIdBatchArray.description: A single string or a string array (max 100 items, for ID fields).

PresenceValue.description: Presence-check value (any truthy string or empty array).

DateValue.description: ISO 8601 date-time string or single-element array.

DaysAgoValue.description: Non-negative integer (days ago) encoded as a string, or single-element array.
